description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the haskell:latest Docker image. Define a before_script that runs apt-get update && apt-get install xz-utils make, sets STACK_ROOT to the .stack directory, runs stack setup, stack install --only-dependencies, and stack build. Add a build job (default stage) that caches the _cache and .stack directories, runs only on non-default branches (rule: $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME != $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH) and executes stack exec site build. Add a pages job that also caches _cache and .stack, runs only on the default branch (rule: $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH), runs stack exec site build, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Ensure both jobs inherit the before_script.
